exercises.title: String Replace
exercises.instructions: Given sentence = "I love cats", replace "cats" with "dogs" and print the result.
exercises.starter_code:
let sentence = "I love cats";

// Replace and print

exercises.title: String Split and Join
exercises.instructions: Given text = "apple,banana,cherry", split by comma, then print each fruit on a new line.
exercises.starter_code:
let text = "apple,banana,cherry";

// Split and print each on a new line
exercises.hints: Use .split(",") then loop, or join with "\n".
